title: ProviderProfile
description: Shared provider-profile substrate record reusable across direct-credential, OAuth, and bridge-runtime lanes.

provider_profile_id.description: Stable provider-profile identity that remains fixed across auth-mode changes and credential rotation.

provider_family.description: Provider family identity used by shared adapter routing.

adapter_kind.description: Adapter family/kind below canonical typed model boundary.

destination_identity.description: Canonical typed destination identity reused from shared gateway semantics.

destination_ref.description: Canonical destination_ref derived from destination identity.

supported_auth_modes.description: Auth modes supported by the provider profile setup lane.

current_auth_mode.description: Current auth mode bound to auth material without changing provider-profile identity.

allowlisted_model_ids.description: Canonical manually managed model IDs allowed for this profile.

model_catalog_posture.description: Broker-projected model-catalog authority posture where discovery/probes remain advisory.

compatibility_posture.description: Compatibility posture independent from auth-material storage shape.

quota_profile_kind.description: Shared quota profile identity; provider-local quota variants are not allowed.

request_binding_kind.description: Shared canonical request-binding contract for model execution audit semantics.

auth_material.description: Non-secret auth-material metadata attached to this profile.

readiness_posture.description: Broker-projected readiness posture dimensions for the provider profile.

lifecycle.description: Broker-projected lifecycle metadata for setup/inspection flows.

validation_attempt_count.description: Count of validation/probe attempts recorded for this profile.

last_validation_succeeded.description: Whether the latest validation attempt concluded with effective ready posture.
